top.name: Sympathy Bolt
top.rules_text: Deal 4 damage. If you have a construct on the board deal 3 instead.

channel.name: Sympathy Bolt (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Construct nearest to target also deals 2 damage to target

bottom.name: Tinker Step
bottom.rules_text: Move 2 tiles. If you end adjacent to a construct gain 2 armor.

channel.name: Tinker Step (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Also repair that construct for 2HP
